query: SELECT config_key, config_value FROM game_config WHERE config_key LIKE '%multi%' OR config_key LIKE '%scale%' OR config_key LIKE '%monster%' LIMIT 20
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT config_key, config_value FROM game_config WHERE config_key LIKE '%multi%' OR config_key LIKE '%scale%' OR config_key LIKE '%monster%' LIMIT 20
